_meta.description: Official Jessica greeting templates. Greeting Agent loads this and surfaces in payload for the Writer to render verbatim — no LLM ad-libbing on first-touch intro.

first_touch_clean._when: User's first message is a pure greeting (hi/你好/...) with no health complaint mentioned.
bubbles: Care Plus 心宜中醫嘅註冊中醫師 🌿
最近身體點啊？瞓得好唔好？有冇邊度唔舒服？
如果想，傾完之後可以影下脷相 + 答幾條問題，我幫你睇下體質 ✨

media.alt: 洪煊宜 Jessica 中醫師 — Care Plus 心宜中醫

first_touch_with_complaint._when: User's first message already mentions a symptom / health concern. Skip the 'have you got problems?' question — just intro and acknowledge.
bubbles: Care Plus 心宜中醫嘅註冊中醫師 🌿
